example: Wind carried fresh sand deposition across the northern edge of the lake.
exampleZh: 风把新的沙粒沉积带到了湖泊北岸。

example: The report presents numerical evidence alongside personal interviews.
exampleZh: 报告在个人访谈之外还提供了数值证据。

example: The new treatment proved extraordinarily effective in early trials.
exampleZh: 这种新疗法在早期试验中显示出非凡效果。

example: The priest read a short passage from scripture during the service.
exampleZh: 牧师在礼拜中诵读了一小段经文。

example: Please pay the attached invoice within fourteen working days.
exampleZh: 请在十四个工作日内支付所附发票。

example: Aerial photographs revealed previously unknown structures beneath the forest.
exampleZh: 航拍照片揭示了森林下方先前未知的建筑结构。

example: The hospital will dispatch another ambulance to the accident scene.
exampleZh: 医院将再派一辆救护车前往事故现场。

example: The road follows a gentle gradient toward the coastal village.
exampleZh: 道路沿着缓坡通向海边村庄。

example: Her bright red lipstick matched the color of her scarf.
exampleZh: 她鲜红的口红与围巾颜色相配。

example: The course examines the historical development and influence of Marxism.
exampleZh: 这门课程研究马克思主义的历史发展与影响。

example: A tiny spark can ignite dry grass within seconds.
exampleZh: 一个微小火花几秒内就能点燃干草。

example: The nurses alternate between day and night shifts each week.
exampleZh: 护士们每周轮换白班和夜班。

example: Industrial waste can contaminate drinking water far downstream.
exampleZh: 工业废物会污染下游很远处的饮用水。

example: Every English syllable contains at least one vowel sound.
exampleZh: 每个英语音节至少包含一个元音。

example: Use a heavy book to flatten the folded map.
exampleZh: 用一本厚书把折叠的地图压平。

example: Constant noise can impair children's ability to learn effectively.
exampleZh: 持续噪声会损害儿童有效学习的能力。

example: They cooked vegetables slowly over a small charcoal fire.
exampleZh: 他们在小炭火上慢慢烹煮蔬菜。

example: The rainforest contains thousands of species not found elsewhere.
exampleZh: 这片雨林拥有数千种其他地方没有的物种。

example: The project will reclaim polluted land for use as a public park.
exampleZh: 该项目将治理受污染土地并改建为公共公园。

example: Judges wield considerable power over the interpretation of law.
exampleZh: 法官对法律解释拥有相当大的权力。

example: A timely warning allowed residents to leave before the landslide.
exampleZh: 及时的警告让居民在山体滑坡前撤离。

example: Poor maintenance seemed to doom the project from the beginning.
exampleZh: 维护不善似乎从一开始就注定项目失败。

example: The patient must swallow one capsule after breakfast each morning.
exampleZh: 患者每天早餐后必须服用一粒胶囊。

example: Her persistence eventually persuaded officials to review the case.
exampleZh: 她的坚持最终说服官员重新审查此案。

example: Simple breathing exercises may alleviate stress before an examination.
exampleZh: 简单的呼吸练习可以缓解考试前的压力。

example: Detach the cable carefully before moving the computer.
exampleZh: 移动电脑前请小心拔下电缆。

example: Outdated regulations continue to hinder development of renewable energy.
exampleZh: 过时的规定继续阻碍可再生能源的发展。

example: Students conducted a mock interview before meeting real employers.
exampleZh: 学生在面见真正雇主前进行了模拟面试。

example: Workers scrub the kitchen floor thoroughly every evening.
exampleZh: 工人们每天晚上彻底擦洗厨房地面。

example: The committee reached a tentative agreement after lengthy discussion.
exampleZh: 委员会经过长时间讨论达成了初步协议。

example: Quick action helped avert a much larger environmental disaster.
exampleZh: 迅速行动帮助避免了一场更大的环境灾难。

example: The dentist discovered a small cavity during the routine examination.
exampleZh: 牙医在常规检查中发现了一个小蛀洞。

example: The novelty of remote work gradually faded for many employees.
exampleZh: 对许多员工来说，远程工作的新鲜感逐渐消退。

example: The university decided to shorten the winter holiday by one week.
exampleZh: 大学决定把寒假缩短一周。

example: No dangerous chemicals were found in the vicinity of the school.
exampleZh: 学校附近没有发现危险化学品。

example: Illegal hunting remains a serious menace to endangered animals.
exampleZh: 非法狩猎仍是濒危动物面临的严重威胁。

example: The ruthless leader punished anyone who questioned his authority.
exampleZh: 这位残酷的领导者惩罚任何质疑其权威的人。

example: Two delivery trucks collide at this busy intersection every year.
exampleZh: 每年都有两辆送货卡车在这个繁忙路口相撞。

example: Daily practice is essential for mastery of a musical instrument.
exampleZh: 每天练习是熟练掌握一种乐器的关键。

example: The principal will commend students who helped during the emergency.
exampleZh: 校长将表扬在紧急情况中提供帮助的学生。

example: The debate continued with renewed vigour after the short break.
exampleZh: 短暂休息后，辩论以新的活力继续进行。

example: The new road will bypass several crowded town centers.
exampleZh: 新公路将绕过几个拥挤的城镇中心。

example: Gentle persuasion proved more effective than direct pressure.
exampleZh: 温和劝说比直接施压更加有效。

example: Her generosity enabled five students to complete their education.
exampleZh: 她的慷慨帮助五名学生完成了学业。

example: The roof needs another vent to release hot air.
exampleZh: 屋顶需要另一个通风口来排出热空气。

example: Climbers faced serious peril when the weather suddenly changed.
exampleZh: 天气突然变化时，登山者面临严重危险。

example: Rescue workers had to wade through waist-deep floodwater.
exampleZh: 救援人员不得不涉过齐腰深的洪水。

example: A savage storm destroyed fishing boats along the coast.
exampleZh: 一场猛烈风暴摧毁了沿海的渔船。

example: The farm supplies fresh poultry to several local restaurants.
exampleZh: 农场向几家当地餐厅供应新鲜家禽。

example: Citizens gathered for a patriotic ceremony in the central square.
exampleZh: 市民在中央广场参加了一场爱国仪式。

example: Modern genetics helps doctors understand many inherited diseases.
exampleZh: 现代遗传学帮助医生理解许多遗传疾病。

example: Years of careful research finally produced a significant payoff.
exampleZh: 多年的认真研究终于带来了显著回报。

example: Dilute the cleaning liquid with water before using it.
exampleZh: 使用清洁液前请用水将其稀释。

example: The eccentric inventor filled his garden with unusual machines.
exampleZh: 这位古怪发明家在花园里放满了不同寻常的机器。

example: Public humiliation made the young athlete consider leaving the team.
exampleZh: 公开羞辱让这位年轻运动员考虑离队。

example: The trainer expects immediate obedience from every working dog.
exampleZh: 训练员要求每只工作犬立即服从命令。

example: The damaged boat drifted ashore near the empty lighthouse.
exampleZh: 受损的小船漂到了空灯塔附近的岸边。

example: The bridge requires periodic inspection to remain safe.
exampleZh: 这座桥需要定期检查以确保安全。

example: Leaves blocked the gutter and caused water to overflow.
exampleZh: 树叶堵住排水沟，导致水溢出。

example: A fine metal mesh keeps insects outside the room.
exampleZh: 细密的金属网把昆虫挡在房间外。

example: The revised design is infinitely safer than the original version.
exampleZh: 修改后的设计比原版安全得多。

example: High maintenance cost is the main drawback of this machine.
exampleZh: 维护成本高是这台机器的主要缺点。

example: Through the fog, we could barely discern the distant coastline.
exampleZh: 透过雾气，我们几乎看不清远处的海岸线。

example: Thousands of unpaid volunteers supported the national vaccination campaign.
exampleZh: 数千名无偿志愿者支持了全国疫苗接种活动。

example: The sudden cancellation filled the waiting crowd with dismay.
exampleZh: 突然取消让等待的人群十分沮丧。

example: Long-distance cycling tests both physical strength and mental endurance.
exampleZh: 长途骑行同时考验体力和心理耐力。

example: A single snow flake landed on the child's glove.
exampleZh: 一片雪花落在孩子的手套上。

example: Customer dissatisfaction increased after repeated delays in delivery.
exampleZh: 多次配送延误后，顾客的不满情绪加剧。

example: A winding road climbs from the valley to the village.
exampleZh: 一条蜿蜒道路从山谷通向村庄。

example: Chemical pollution accelerated the degradation of the river ecosystem.
exampleZh: 化学污染加速了河流生态系统的退化。

example: Press the brake pedal gently when approaching the corner.
exampleZh: 接近转弯处时请轻踩制动踏板。

example: The employee handbook explains leave, safety, and workplace conduct.
exampleZh: 员工手册说明了休假、安全和工作场所行为规范。

example: The frail patient needed assistance when walking across the room.
exampleZh: 这位身体虚弱的患者走过房间时需要帮助。

example: The project requires a gigantic amount of steel and concrete.
exampleZh: 这个项目需要大量钢材和混凝土。

example: The singer expanded her repertoire with several traditional folk songs.
exampleZh: 这位歌手用几首传统民歌扩充了自己的曲目。

example: The old software is incompatible with our new operating system.
exampleZh: 旧软件与我们的新操作系统不兼容。

example: The stone fortress protected the harbor for several centuries.
exampleZh: 这座石头要塞保护了港口数百年。

example: The refugees endured wretched conditions during the long winter.
exampleZh: 难民们在漫长冬季忍受了悲惨的生活条件。

example: The reactor uses enriched uranium as part of its fuel.
exampleZh: 该反应堆使用浓缩铀作为部分燃料。

example: Improved material reduced water penetration through the outer wall.
exampleZh: 改进的材料减少了水分渗透外墙。

example: The factory announced a temporary layoff during the quiet season.
exampleZh: 工厂宣布在淡季暂时裁员。

example: The artist shaped each ceramic bowl entirely by hand.
exampleZh: 艺术家完全用手塑造每只陶瓷碗。

example: Excessive noise is an undesirable feature of the new machine.
exampleZh: 噪声过大是这台新机器一个不受欢迎的特点。

example: The issue gained national prominence after the television investigation.
exampleZh: 电视调查播出后，这个问题在全国受到关注。

example: World leaders will convene next month to discuss climate finance.
exampleZh: 各国领导人下月将齐聚讨论气候资金问题。

example: Her calm temperament makes her well suited to emergency medicine.
exampleZh: 她沉着的性格使她很适合急诊医学。

example: The protective coating contains a small amount of nickel.
exampleZh: 防护涂层含有少量镍。

example: The new safety standard is now universally accepted by manufacturers.
exampleZh: 这项新安全标准现已得到制造商的普遍接受。

example: There was no overt sign of damage on the container.
exampleZh: 容器表面没有明显的损坏迹象。

example: The photographer had to squat beside the stream for balance.
exampleZh: 摄影师不得不蹲在溪边保持平衡。

example: Simultaneous translation allowed everyone to follow the international conference.
exampleZh: 同声传译让所有人都能听懂这场国际会议。

example: The dentist recommended immediate extraction of the badly damaged tooth.
exampleZh: 牙医建议立即拔除严重受损的牙齿。

example: The software can simulate traffic under several weather conditions.
exampleZh: 该软件可以模拟多种天气条件下的交通。

example: Seeds germinate best within a narrow optimum temperature range.
exampleZh: 种子在狭窄的最佳温度范围内发芽最好。

example: The mysterious map continued to intrigue historians for decades.
exampleZh: 这张神秘地图数十年来一直吸引着历史学家。

example: The mechanic checked the wheel alignment after replacing the tires.
exampleZh: 更换轮胎后，机械师检查了车轮定位。

example: We gathered fallen chestnut leaves for the classroom display.
exampleZh: 我们收集落下的栗树叶用于课堂展示。

example: Her intuition warned her that the simple explanation was incomplete.
exampleZh: 她的直觉提醒她，那个简单解释并不完整。

example: We took a roundabout route to avoid the flooded highway.
exampleZh: 我们绕道而行，以避开被淹的公路。

example: The discovery became a catalyst for major reforms in healthcare.
exampleZh: 这项发现成为医疗改革的重要催化剂。
